name: part_003
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_003.webm

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal plays a stage board game and lands on a 'Peace' square.
The board game continues, and Aki lands on a 'Microphone' square.
Aki Rosenthal performs 'Ai Scream!' with guests Houshou Marine and Sakura Miko.

subtitles.original: 何が出るんだろう？
subtitles.english: What will come out?

subtitles.original: お！え？お？え？
subtitles.english: Oh! Eh? Oh? Eh?

subtitles.original: 何、何、何？どうなっちゃうの？
subtitles.english: What, what, what? What's going to happen?

subtitles.original: ピース？
subtitles.english: Peace?

subtitles.original: ん？何だ？
subtitles.english: Hmm? What is it?

subtitles.original: Ah Happy なけなしの情
subtitles.english: Ah Happy, the meager passion

subtitles.original: Unlucky どなた様も
subtitles.english: Unlucky, everyone

subtitles.original: Be Happy いま目醒めせよ
subtitles.english: Be Happy, wake up now

subtitles.original: Undead 生きているんだろ
subtitles.english: Undead, you're alive, right?

subtitles.original: 目を逸らした過去も
subtitles.english: The past you turned away from

subtitles.original: 退屈な未来も
subtitles.english: The tedious future too

subtitles.original: カウントダウン 嗚呼 やれやれ
subtitles.english: Countdown, ah, good grief

subtitles.original: 古今東西 ピース ピース
subtitles.english: All times and places, peace, peace

subtitles.original:
UNDEAD
作詞・作曲：Ayase
subtitles.english:
UNDEAD
Lyrics/Composition: Ayase

subtitles.original:
ねえねえねえ なんだかどうして
戦ってるようなそんな気がするの
subtitles.english:
Hey, hey, hey, for some reason
I feel like I'm fighting

subtitles.original: 逃げられない 痛くもない ここにいる自分
subtitles.english: Can't run, doesn't hurt, my self who's right here

subtitles.original: とっくに死んでる 透明なブレイド対決
subtitles.english: Long since dead, a duel with transparent blades

subtitles.original: 痛いけどいたい記憶の奥
subtitles.english: Deep inside the memories I want to keep, even though they hurt

subtitles.original: 残念 もういないのに あれ そっちがアイロニー
subtitles.english:
Too bad, I'm not here anymore,
oh, that's the irony

subtitles.original: 透かされてるのは今の自分
subtitles.english: The one being seen through is my current self

subtitles.original: ナンセンス 消えないレッテル 言わばコンプレックス
subtitles.english:
Nonsense, an indelible label,
so to speak, a complex

subtitles.original: 取り憑かれてるみたい 巻きついたまま
subtitles.english: It's like being possessed, remaining entwined

subtitles.original: まだ離れない 有りし日の自分
subtitles.english: My self from former days still won't leave

subtitles.original: Undead
subtitles.english: Undead

subtitles.original: 死んじゃいない お前とお前の連鎖
subtitles.english: Not dead, the chain between you and yourself

subtitles.original: 生きてるかどう問われ続けるカタチ
subtitles.english: A form that continues to be asked if it's alive

subtitles.original: 不相応に甘んじて満足するなよ
subtitles.english: Don't be satisfied with settling for less than you deserve

subtitles.original: 幸せになろうとしないなんて 酷だ
subtitles.english: It's cruel not to even try to be happy

subtitles.original: この世 この世は奇怪奇怪ファンタジー
subtitles.english: This world, this world is a strange, strange fantasy

subtitles.original: 次は鬼が出るか蛇が出るか
subtitles.english: Will a demon appear next, or a snake?

subtitles.original: 待って待って やっと始まる物語
subtitles.english: Wait, wait, the story is finally beginning

subtitles.original: さあ行こうぜ 化け物ばかりの その舞台 ピース ピース
subtitles.english:
Let's go, that stage full of nothing but monsters,
peace, peace

subtitles.original: Ah... The future can't change the past...
subtitles.english: Ah... The future can't change the past...

subtitles.original: But the future is now for the future...
subtitles.english: But the future is now for the future...

subtitles.original: ねえなんだかどうして 未来になんてさほどの
subtitles.english:
Hey, for some reason,
for the future, not much...

subtitles.original: 期待も持てないような気がして
subtitles.english: I feel like I can't hold much expectation

subtitles.original: もう随分生きてる 意趣返し テンプレ 食傷
subtitles.english: I've lived long enough, revenge, templates, fed up

subtitles.original: 素敵なんて出来事の気配もない
subtitles.english: Not even a hint of something wonderful happening

subtitles.original: 残念 既出経験 因果形骸化
subtitles.english:
Too bad, already experienced,
causality reduced to a shell

subtitles.original: 私は退屈の進化
subtitles.english: I am the evolution of boredom

subtitles.original: 今日は刺激が欲しいんだ 飽きちゃった誰かさん
subtitles.english:
I want some excitement today,
someone who's gotten bored

subtitles.original: なんて悟って浮かべる セルフコンプライアンス
subtitles.english: Realizing that, I display self-compliance

subtitles.original: 透かされていくみたい 垂直降下
subtitles.english: It's like being seen through, a vertical drop

subtitles.original: あれもこれもどれも同じ味がする
subtitles.english: This, that, and everything tastes the same

subtitles.original: Undead
subtitles.english: Undead

subtitles.original: 死んじゃいない お前とお前の連鎖
subtitles.english: Not dead, the chain between you and yourself

subtitles.original: いつの世も過去も未来も今にあるんだ
subtitles.english: In any age, the past and future are in the present

subtitles.original: 生きていることを愚直に果たせよ
subtitles.english: Fulfill the act of living with simple honesty

subtitles.original: 目指せハッピーエンド
subtitles.english: Aim for a happy ending

subtitles.original: Undead
subtitles.english: Undead

subtitles.original: 死んじゃいない お前に見せてるんだ
subtitles.english: Not dead, I'm showing you

subtitles.original: 幸せを諦めてしまうな 人であれ
subtitles.english: Don't give up on happiness, be human

subtitles.original: ただ苦しみに慣れて耐えているだけじゃ
subtitles.english: If you're just used to suffering and enduring it...

subtitles.original: 死んでいるも同然 屍の Undead
subtitles.english: You're as good as dead, a corpse of an Undead

subtitles.original: Ah Happy なけなしの情
subtitles.english: Ah Happy, the meager passion

subtitles.original: Unlucky どなた様も
subtitles.english: Unlucky, everyone

subtitles.original: Be Happy いま目醒めせよ
subtitles.english: Be Happy, wake up now

subtitles.original: 生きているんだろう
subtitles.english: You're alive, aren't you?

subtitles.original: 不相応に足掻け 幸せに成るの
subtitles.english:
Struggle for what you don't deserve,
to become happy

subtitles.original: もう全部全部お前だ 古今東西
subtitles.english: It's all you, all of it, all times and places

subtitles.original: 死ぬまで遊べ ピース ピース
subtitles.english: Play until you die, peace, peace

subtitles.original: Ah... The future can't change the past...
subtitles.english: Ah... The future can't change the past...

subtitles.original: But the future is now for the future...
subtitles.english: But the future is now for the future...

subtitles.original: 独りになれど怖くはないこと
subtitles.english: That you're not afraid even if you become alone

subtitles.original: この化け物ばかりの 舞台 ピース ピース
subtitles.english:
This stage full of nothing but monsters,
peace, peace

subtitles.original:
愛♡スクリーム！

作曲：DJ Chika a.k.a. INHERIT / Hayato Yamamoto
subtitles.english:
Ai Scream!
Lyrics: aim

subtitles.original: 愛♡スクリーム！
subtitles.english: Ai Scream!

subtitles.original: 教えてもっと あなたのこと
subtitles.english: Tell me more about yourself

subtitles.original: Tell me more & more, Tell me more & more
subtitles.english: Tell me more & more, Tell me more & more

subtitles.original: 聞かせてもっと あなたの声
subtitles.english: Let me hear more of your voice

subtitles.original: Let me know more & more, Let me know more & more
subtitles.english: Let me know more & more, Let me know more & more

subtitles.original: こんなドキドキ 想像できない
subtitles.english: I can't imagine this kind of excitement

subtitles.original: Oh I need you, Oh I need you
subtitles.english: Oh I need you, Oh I need you

subtitles.original: 友達は卒業 運命の私
subtitles.english: Graduating from being friends, find my destined self

subtitles.original: 見つけてほしいな
subtitles.english: I want you to find me

subtitles.original: Fu!
subtitles.english: Fu!
